name: shopify2simplyprint
description: Self-hosted Shopify app that automatically adds 3D print jobs to your SimplyPrint queue when orders are paid

SHOPIFY_API_KEY.description: The **Client ID** of your Shopify app, from the Shopify Partner Dashboard under **Apps → your app → Overview → Client credentials**. Not a secret.

SHOPIFY_API_SECRET.description: The **Client secret** of your Shopify app, from the same **Client credentials** panel as the Client ID above.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: A random 32-character string used to encrypt your SimplyPrint API key before storing it. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 16`.

SHOPIFY_APP_URL.description: The public URL of this Worker. You do not know it yet on this screen, so enter `https://example.com` for now. After the deploy finishes, Cloudflare shows your real Worker URL: set this variable to it and redeploy. See [step 3 of the README](https://github.com/dennisklappe/Shopify2SimplyPrint#step-3-point-shopify-at-your-worker).
